mapper.select: SELECT LAWD_CODE ,SIDO_NAME ,SGG_NAME ,UMD_NAME ,RI_NAME ,UPPER_LAWD_CODE ,USE_FLAG ,CREATED_AT :: TIMESTAMP AS CREATED_AT ,UPDATED_AT :: TIMESTAMP AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_LAWD_CODE WHERE UPPER_LAWD_CODE = #{upperLawdCode}

SELECT DISTINCT ON(PSW.LAWD_CODE) PSW.PSW_ID ,PSW.LAWD_CODE ,PSW.UPPER_LAWD_CODE ,LC.SIDO_NAME ,LC.SGG_NAME ,PSW.STAT_DATE ,PSW.PLANT_CNT ,PSW.PLANT_CAP ,PSW.FUEL_PWR ,PSW.CREATED_AT :: TIMESTAMP AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_PLANT_STAT_WEEK PSW LEFT JOIN TB_LAWD_CODE LC ON PSW.LAWD_CODE = LC.LAWD_CODE WHERE PSW.UPPER_LAWD_CODE = #{upperLawdCode} ORDER BY PSW.LAWD_CODE, PSW.STAT_DATE DESC

SELECT SUM(PLANT_CNT) AS TOTAL_PLANT_CNT ,SUM(PLANT_CAP) AS TOTAL_PLANT_CAP ,SUM(FUEL_PWR) AS TOTAL_FUEL_PWR FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON(LAWD_CODE) PLANT_CNT ,PLANT_CAP ,FUEL_PWR FROM TB_PLANT_STAT_WEEK WHERE UPPER_LAWD_CODE = #{upperLawdCode} ORDER BY LAWD_CODE, STAT_DATE DESC )

SELECT GSM.GSM_ID ,GSM.LAWD_CODE ,LC.SIDO_NAME ,GSM.YEAR ,GSM.MONTH ,GSM.FUEL_PWR ,GSM.CREATED_AT :: TIMESTAMP AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_GEN_STAT_MONTH GSM LEFT JOIN TB_LAWD_CODE LC ON GSM.LAWD_CODE = LC.LAWD_CODE WHERE GSM.YEAR = #{year} ORDER BY GSM.LAWD_CODE, GSM.MONTH

SELECT PSY.PSY_ID ,PSY.LAWD_CODE ,LC.SIDO_NAME ,PSY.YEAR ,PSY.PLANT_CNT ,PSY.PLANT_CAP ,PSY.CREATED_AT :: TIMESTAMP AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_PLANT_STAT_YEAR PSY LEFT JOIN TB_LAWD_CODE LC ON PSY.LAWD_CODE = LC.LAWD_CODE WHERE PSY.YEAR = #{year} ORDER BY PSY.LAWD_CODE
